checklist.criterion: Separates the whole from the idea
checklist.description: Characterises the framework mechanically and distinguishes the ill-fitting whole from the single transferable technique.
Confirms the whole is a poor fit while the one technique is not already covered by an existing dimension or capability.
Renders exactly one verdict band, Partial fit, recording the salvageable idea to build natively only when a concrete need appears.
Never proposes importing the whole framework or porting its project-specific glue and literals.
